name: workflow-skills
description: Methodology skills for coding agents — planning, design, TDD, systematic debugging, verification, code review, handoff. Stack-agnostic; pairs with project-local agents/prompts/instructions via a router template.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, review, and verification workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Stack-agnostic methodology skills + a workflow router template. Use the router to map task descriptions ("plan this", "test first", "is this safe?", "verify") to the smallest combination of skill / agent playbook / reusable prompt / scoped instruction. Skills included: plan, tdd, verify, review, security-review, diagnose, handoff, grill-me, grill-with-docs, design, new-feature, zoom-out, devops, write-skill.
defaultPrompt: Plan the next change before we touch any code.
Let's add a feature to this project.
